scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/decks typecheck && bun run --cwd examples/basic typecheck && bun run --cwd examples/minimal typecheck && bun run --cwd examples/honox typecheck && bun run --cwd docs typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/decks test && bun run --cwd examples/basic test && bun run --cwd examples/minimal test && bun run --cwd examples/honox test && bun run --cwd docs test
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build:docs
